scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=apps/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/web && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/server
